subject: A simple question about export tilt series for IMOD
body:
My dataset was collected as a storage form: directory1 & 1.mrc.mdoc & 
directory2 & 2.mrc.mdoc and so on. The tilt series are called 
tomo_0_0°.mrc  tomo_1_3°.mrc and so on. They are in the directory1,  
directory2 and so on. So the file names are the same in different 
directories. Now, I want to do CTF estimation at a time. So I give all of 
them a pre-suffix name, such as 1_tomo_0_0°.mrc, 1_tomo_1_3°.mrc, ... , 
2_tomo_0_0°.mrc, .... And I move all of them to a directory. And I can do 
it at a time. However, when I was exporting tilt series for IMOD, there was 
an error that 1.mrc.mdoc had not been pre-processed. How can I deal with 
it?
